blinded.description: Cannot see. All terrain is difficult terrain. -4 to Perception. Auto-fail sight-based checks.
blinded.npc_instruction: You cannot see anything. Move cautiously (all terrain is difficult). Target enemies by sound — expect to miss often. Prioritize recovering from this condition or retreating.
blinded.gm_instruction: Attacker is off-guard to the blinded creature. Blinded creature treats all creatures as hidden. Flat check DC 11 to target.

clumsy.description: Penalty to DEX-based checks, AC, and Reflex saves (per rank).
clumsy.npc_instruction: Your agility is impaired. Avoid situations requiring acrobatics or precise movement. Your AC is lower — consider defensive positioning.
clumsy.gm_instruction: Apply -N penalty per rank to all DEX-based checks, AC, and Reflex saves.

confused.description: Off-guard, can't use reactions, must attack random adjacent target.
confused.npc_instruction: You are confused and not in control. Attack a random creature adjacent to you (ally or enemy). You cannot choose your target or use reactions.
confused.gm_instruction: The confused character is off-guard and must use their actions to Strike a random adjacent creature. If no adjacent creature, they babble incoherently. Flat check DC 11 at end of turn to recover.

controlled.description: Another creature determines all your actions.
controlled.npc_instruction: You have no free will. The controlling creature decides everything you do. Suppress your own goals entirely.
controlled.gm_instruction: The controller chooses all of the controlled creature's actions. The controlled creature is off-guard.

dying.description: Unconscious, progressing toward death. Recovery check at start of turn.
dying.npc_instruction: You are unconscious and dying. You CANNOT act. Your fate depends on allies stabilizing you.
dying.gm_instruction: Character is unconscious. At start of each turn, make a flat check (DC 10 + dying value). Success: reduce dying by 1. Failure: increase by 1. Dying 4 = death.

enfeebled.description: Penalty to STR-based checks and damage (per rank).
enfeebled.npc_instruction: Your strength is sapped. Melee attacks and Athletics checks are penalized. Consider ranged options or spellcasting instead.
enfeebled.gm_instruction: Apply -N penalty per rank to all STR-based checks, attack rolls using STR, and STR-based damage.

fascinated.description: Focused on a subject. -2 to Perception and skill checks unrelated to the subject.
fascinated.npc_instruction: You are fixated on the subject of your fascination. You cannot willingly use hostile actions. If threatened or damaged, the fascination breaks.
fascinated.gm_instruction: Character takes -2 to Perception and all skill checks not related to the fascinating subject. Hostile actions break the condition.

fatigued.description: -1 to AC and saving throws. Cannot explore.
fatigued.npc_instruction: You are exhausted. Your defenses are weakened. If possible, seek rest. Avoid extended combat.
fatigued.gm_instruction: Apply -1 to AC and all saving throws. Recovers after a full night's rest.

fleeing.description: Must spend all actions trying to escape.
fleeing.npc_instruction: You are overcome with the need to flee. Spend ALL your actions moving away from the source of fear. You cannot voluntarily stop fleeing.
fleeing.gm_instruction: Character must use all actions to move away from the source. Cannot use other actions. If cornered, cowers (no actions).

frightened.description: Penalty to all checks and DCs (per rank). Reduces by 1 at end of each turn.
frightened.npc_instruction: You are afraid. Everything you do is penalized. Consider defensive actions or retreating from the source of fear. The fear fades over time.
frightened.gm_instruction: Apply -N penalty per rank to all checks and DCs. Reduces by 1 automatically at end of the frightened creature's turn.

grabbed.description: Off-guard and immobilized. Can attempt to Escape.
grabbed.npc_instruction: You are held in place and off-guard. You cannot move. Use the Escape action (Athletics or Acrobatics) to break free. This should be your top priority.
grabbed.gm_instruction: Character is off-guard (-2 AC) and immobilized. Can attempt Escape action (Athletics or Acrobatics vs grabber's Athletics DC).

immobilized.description: Cannot use actions with the move trait.
immobilized.npc_instruction: You cannot move from your current position. Focus on ranged attacks, spells, or actions that don't require movement.
immobilized.gm_instruction: Character cannot Stride, Step, or use any action with the move trait.

off_guard.npc_instruction: Your defenses are down — enemies can exploit your vulnerability. Reposition or use defensive actions if possible.
off_guard.gm_instruction: Apply -2 circumstance penalty to AC. Known as flat-footed in legacy rules.

paralyzed.description: Off-guard, can't act. Flat check DC 11 at end of turn to recover.
paralyzed.npc_instruction: You are completely paralyzed. You CANNOT act at all. You can only hope to recover at the end of your turn.
paralyzed.gm_instruction: Character is off-guard, cannot act. Flat check DC 11 at end of each turn to recover.

prone.description: -2 to attack rolls. Off-guard. Must Stand (1 action) to get up.
prone.npc_instruction: You are on the ground. Your attacks are penalized and you are off-guard. Use the Stand action (1 action) to get up before attacking.
prone.gm_instruction: Character takes -2 to melee attack rolls and is off-guard. Standing up costs 1 action.

quickened.description: Gain 1 extra action per turn (with restrictions).
quickened.npc_instruction: You have an extra action this turn! Use it wisely — it may be restricted to certain action types (Strike, Stride, or Step).
quickened.gm_instruction: Character gains 1 additional action. The granting effect usually restricts what the extra action can be used for.

restrained.description: Off-guard, immobilized, and clumsy 2. Can attempt to Escape.
restrained.npc_instruction: You are heavily restrained — off-guard, immobile, and clumsy. Escaping should be your highest priority. Use Escape action.
restrained.gm_instruction: Character is off-guard, immobilized, and clumsy 2. Can attempt Escape.

sickened.description: Penalty to all checks and DCs (per rank). Must save to reduce.
sickened.npc_instruction: You feel ill. Everything is penalized. You can spend an action to retch (Fortitude save) to try to reduce the sickness.
sickened.gm_instruction: Apply -N penalty per rank to all checks and DCs. Character can spend an action to attempt a Fortitude save to reduce sickened value by 1.

slowed.description: Lose actions at start of turn (per rank).
slowed.npc_instruction: You have fewer actions this turn. Choose carefully — prioritize your most impactful action.
slowed.gm_instruction: Character loses N actions at the start of their turn. With slowed 1, they have 2 actions instead of 3.

stunned.description: Lose actions at start of turn. Can't use reactions.
stunned.npc_instruction: You are stunned and lose actions. You may have very few or no actions this turn. You cannot use reactions.
stunned.gm_instruction: Character loses N actions at start of turn (stunned value). Cannot use reactions while stunned. Stunned value decreases by actions lost.

stupefied.description: Penalty to INT/WIS/CHA-based checks and spell DCs (per rank). Flat check to cast spells.
stupefied.npc_instruction: Your mental faculties are impaired. Spellcasting is unreliable — you must make a flat check or the spell fails. Consider non-magical options.
stupefied.gm_instruction: Apply -N penalty per rank to INT/WIS/CHA checks and spell DCs. Casting a spell requires a flat check (DC 5 + stupefied value); failure wastes the spell.

unconscious.description: Can't act, -4 AC, blinded, off-guard. Drops held items.
unconscious.npc_instruction: You are unconscious. You CANNOT act. You are unaware of your surroundings.
unconscious.gm_instruction: Character drops what they're holding, falls prone, -4 AC, off-guard, blinded. Cannot perceive or act.

derived.armor_class: 10 + min(dex_mod, armor_dex_cap) + if(prof_unarmored > 0, prof_unarmored + level, 0) + item_bonus_ac + shield_bonus + bonus_ac
derived.skill_acrobatics: dex_mod + if(prof_acrobatics > 0, prof_acrobatics + level, 0) + bonus_acrobatics + armor_check_penalty
derived.skill_athletics: str_mod + if(prof_athletics > 0, prof_athletics + level, 0) + bonus_athletics + armor_check_penalty
derived.skill_stealth: dex_mod + if(prof_stealth > 0, prof_stealth + level, 0) + bonus_stealth + armor_check_penalty
derived.skill_thievery: dex_mod + if(prof_thievery > 0, prof_thievery + level, 0) + bonus_thievery + armor_check_penalty

rules: sequence defines execution order — reorder steps as tactics demand
Most turns use at most one move and one action
action MUST be one of the available actions — NOT an ability name
action/targets/move_to can all be null (narrative-only turn)
